purpose: Guardrail policy for narrowly scoped WellFit automatic repair. This stage allows only safe documentation/register/JSON-format repair attempts for already allowed docs/register/validator governance work, with a same-branch commit and rerun evidence. It does not enable runtime product repairs, protected-scope repairs, Unity/PR #13 changes, token/reward/payment authority changes, merges, deployments, dependency changes, or repository-setting changes.
safeRepairCategories: markdown trailing whitespace or final-newline formatting in docs/register markdown
JSON formatting or parse error in project-register files
missing TODO_INDEX or WORK_MAP pointer for newly added governance docs/register artifacts
missing KI-Fortsetzungs-Prompt in newly added architecture doc
missing progress-log or work-log evidence when all changed files remain in allowed docs/register scope

allowedFailureTypes.category: markdown trailing whitespace or final-newline formatting in docs/register markdown
requiredEvidence: diff limited to whitespace-only markdown cleanup

allowedFailureTypes.category: JSON formatting or parse error in project-register files
requiredEvidence: failing jq or JSON parse output

allowedFailureTypes.category: missing TODO_INDEX pointer for newly added governance doc
requiredEvidence: TODO_INDEX entry pointing to existing leading file

allowedFailureTypes.category: missing WORK_MAP pointer for newly added governance register
requiredEvidence: WORK_MAP entry pointing to existing register and architecture note

allowedFailureTypes.category: missing KI-Fortsetzungs-Prompt in newly added architecture doc
missing progress-log or work-log evidence when all changed files remain in allowed docs/register scope
requiredEvidence: complete changed-file list proving docs/register-only scope

forbiddenFailureTypes: Firebase Functions failure requiring code changes
dependency install, upgrade, downgrade, or lockfile repair
security, privacy, legal, compliance, child-safety, health, location, payment, token, NFT, wallet, betting, reward authority, or mission completion authority failure
test failure with ambiguous root cause
build failure that requires changing app/**, components/**, lib/**, functions/**, firestore.rules, native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR/**, package.json, or package-lock.json
any failure after maxRepairAttempts is reached
stopConditions: failure does not match exactly one allowedFailureTypes entry
failure touches or appears to require a forbiddenRepairPaths path
failure touches or appears to require a forbiddenRepairTopics topic
required evidence is missing or ambiguous
repair would modify runtime product code or protected compliance/product logic
repair would require package.json or package-lock.json without explicit approval
repair would require dependency installation or network-dependent package changes
repair would require merge, deploy, branch rewrite, rebase, force-push, or PR #13 action
the same failure persists after maxRepairAttempts
new failure appears after a repair attempt
human reviewer requests stop or the agent cannot explain the root cause
repair would modify scripts outside an explicitly allowed validator/check/report task scope
repair would expand the approved task scope beyond docs/register/JSON-format evidence fixes
repair would require editing public assets, GitHub workflows, Firebase configuration, native files, Unity files, or protected authority areas
requiredEvidence: exact failed check name or parser error
post-repair command result and same-branch repair commit evidence
human review note for any ineligible or stopped condition

stages.permission: Analyse, dry-runs, reports, eligibility decisions and governance validation only; no file writes except generated reports explicitly owned by the invoked checker.
mustNot: create pull requests from a runner

stages.permission: One agent may execute exactly one approved low-risk docs/register/check-script task per branch within allowed governance paths.
mustNot: auto-repair beyond explicitly requested task scope
requiredEvidence: json validation for changed policy/register files

stages.permission: One agent may modify only runtime files explicitly allowlisted by a separate human approval for a concrete task.
mustNot: touch protected compliance/economy/health/child/location/camera/Unity/PR #13 areas unless separately approved with review plan
requiredEvidence: separate human approval naming exact runtime files

stages.permission: Only narrowly defined repairs from the auto-repair policy may be attempted after failed evidence checks.
mayChange: files already within the approved task scope and safe repair categories
requiredEvidence: rerun failed and full required checks

stages.permission: Auto-merge may be considered only after complete local check evidence, successful required GitHub checks, mergeability, PR diff review, auto-repair decision, and human review evidence required by policy.
mustNot: merge protected/runtime-risk changes without explicit review evidence

currentRelease.scope: One-agent docs/register/validator governance execution is active, and auto-repair is limited to allowlisted docs/register/JSON-format evidence fixes only. Runtime execution, protected-scope repair, auto-merge and deploy remain disabled.

activationDecision.reason: Activate only the small safe repair tier requested for docs/register/JSON-format evidence failures while keeping runtime, protected, Unity, reward, token, payment, merge, and deploy actions blocked.
activationDecision.effectiveScope: Automatic repair may only touch allowlisted docs/register markdown or project-register JSON evidence/formatting files for the active single_agent_docs_register_build PR scope.
